name: Assistance lots
fullName: UI ~ Assistence - TM Medical record: Assistance lots

steps.name: When the user goes to the home page
Given the user chooses "UI_create_assistance_lots" in the tm medical record strategy
When the user creates an assistance lots with "<administration_tm_purchase_last_center_consumption_description_create>" consumption center and "<last_inventory_group_description>" inventory group
